---
title: "Mary Elizabeth Webster"
---

## Mary Elizabeth Webster

**Dates:** (b. Worcs. 1839)

### Description

charity organizer

### Biography

In the 1891 census she is found at Ripple Lodge, Malvern Link with her younger sister Margaret.

### Letters

- Letter from March 7th [1887[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
